name: video-template-hyperframes-product-reveal-minimal
title: HyperFrames: 5-Second Minimal Product Reveal

title_i18n.ja: HyperFrames：5秒ミニマル製品リビール
title_i18n.fr: HyperFrames : Révélation produit minimaliste de 5 secondes
title_i18n.es: HyperFrames: Presentación minimalista de producto en 5 segundos
title_i18n.pt-BR: HyperFrames: Revelação minimalista de produto em 5 segundos
title_i18n.it: HyperFrames: Rivelazione prodotto minimalista in 5 secondi
title_i18n.vi: HyperFrames: Giới thiệu sản phẩm tối giản 5 giây
title_i18n.ar: HyperFrames: كشف منتج بسيط في 5 ثوانٍ

description: A 5-second HyperFrames composition for a high-end product reveal — dark canvas, single warm accent, slow push-in title card, kinetic kicker line, restrained motion. The agent renders MP4 from HTML+GSAP via puppeteer; no stock footage needed.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 5秒 HyperFrames 高端产品展示动画——深色画布、单一暖色点缀、缓慢推进标题卡、动态文字、克制运动。通过 puppeteer 从 HTML+GSAP 渲染 MP4，无需素材库。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 5秒 HyperFrames 高端產品展示動畫——深色畫布、單一暖色點綴、緩慢推進標題卡、動態文字、克制運動。透過 puppeteer 從 HTML+GSAP 渲染 MP4，無需素材庫。
description_i18n.ja: 5秒のHyperFrames高級製品リビール映像——ダークキャンバス、単一のウォームアクセント、スローなプッシュインタイトルカード、キネティックキッカーライン、抑制されたモーション。puppeteerでHTML+GSAPからMP4をレンダリング、ストック映像不要。
description_i18n.ko: 5초 HyperFrames 고급 제품 공개 영상 — 어두운 캔버스, 단일 따뜻한 액센트, 느린 푸시인 타이틀 카드, 키네틱 키커 라인, 절제된 모션. puppeteer로 HTML+GSAP에서 MP4 렌더링, 스톡 영상 불필요.
description_i18n.de: Eine 5-sekündige HyperFrames-Komposition für hochwertige Produkt-Enthüllungen — dunkle Leinwand, einzelner warmer Akzent, langsame Push-in-Titelkarte, kinetische Kicker-Zeile, zurückhaltende Bewegung. Rendert MP4 aus HTML+GSAP via puppeteer; keine Stock-Footage erforderlich.
description_i18n.fr: Une composition HyperFrames de 5 secondes pour une révélation produit haut de gamme — toile sombre, accent chaleureux unique, carte de titre en poussée lente, ligne kicker cinétique, mouvement retenu. Rendu MP4 depuis HTML+GSAP via puppeteer ; aucun métrage stock requis.
description_i18n.ru: 5-секундная композиция HyperFrames для презентации премиум-продукта — тёмный фон, одиночный тёплый акцент, медленная титульная карта с наездом, кинетическая кикер-строка, сдержанное движение. Рендерит MP4 из HTML+GSAP через puppeteer; стоковые материалы не требуются.
description_i18n.es: Una composición HyperFrames de 5 segundos para presentación de producto premium — lienzo oscuro, acento cálido único, tarjeta de título con empuje lento, línea kicker cinética, movimiento contenido. Renderiza MP4 desde HTML+GSAP vía puppeteer; no necesita material de archivo.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Uma composição HyperFrames de 5 segundos para revelação de produto premium — tela escura, único acento quente, cartão de título com push-in lento, linha kicker cinética, movimento contido. Renderiza MP4 a partir de HTML+GSAP via puppeteer; não necessita footage de estoque.
description_i18n.it: Una composizione HyperFrames di 5 secondi per rivelazione prodotto di alta gamma — tela scura, singolo accento caldo, card titolo con push-in lento, linea kicker cinetica, movimento contenuto. Renderizza MP4 da HTML+GSAP via puppeteer; nessun filmato stock necessario.
description_i18n.vi: Tác phẩm HyperFrames 5 giây cho giới thiệu sản phẩm cao cấp — canvas tối, điểm nhấn ấm duy nhất, thẻ tiêu đề đẩy chậm, dòng kicker động học, chuyển động tiết chế. Render MP4 từ HTML+GSAP qua puppeteer; không cần footage có sẵn.
description_i18n.pl: 5-sekundowa kompozycja HyperFrames do prezentacji produktu premium — ciemne płótno, pojedynczy ciepły akcent, powolna karta tytułowa z najazdem, kinetyczna linia kicker, stonowany ruch. Renderuje MP4 z HTML+GSAP przez puppeteer; nie wymaga materiałów stockowych.
description_i18n.id: Komposisi HyperFrames 5 detik untuk pengungkapan produk kelas atas — kanvas gelap, aksen hangat tunggal, kartu judul push-in lambat, garis kicker kinetik, gerakan terkendali. Render MP4 dari HTML+GSAP via puppeteer; tidak perlu footage stok.
description_i18n.nl: Een 5-seconden HyperFrames-compositie voor hoogwaardige productonthulling — donker canvas, enkele warme accent, langzame push-in titelkaart, kinetische kicker-regel, ingetogen beweging. Rendert MP4 vanuit HTML+GSAP via puppeteer; geen stockmateriaal nodig.
description_i18n.ar: تكوين HyperFrames لمدة 5 ثوانٍ للكشف عن منتج راقٍ — لوحة داكنة، لمسة دافئة واحدة، بطاقة عنوان بدفع بطيء، خط kicker حركي، حركة مقيدة. يعرض MP4 من HTML+GSAP عبر puppeteer؛ لا حاجة لمواد جاهزة.
description_i18n.tr: Üst düzey ürün tanıtımı için 5 saniyelik HyperFrames kompozisyon — koyu tuval, tek sıcak vurgu, yavaş push-in başlık kartı, kinetik kicker satırı, kısıtlı hareket. puppeteer aracılığıyla HTML+GSAP'tan MP4 render eder; stok görüntü gerekmez.
description_i18n.uk: 5-секундна композиція HyperFrames для презентації преміум-продукту — темне полотно, єдиний теплий акцент, повільна титульна картка з наїздом, кінетична кікер-лінія, стримані рухи. Рендерить MP4 з HTML+GSAP через puppeteer; стокові матеріали не потрібні.
description_i18n.en: A 5-second HyperFrames composition for a high-end product reveal — dark canvas, single warm accent, slow push-in title card, kinetic kicker line, restrained motion. The agent renders MP4 from HTML+GSAP via puppeteer; no stock footage needed.

query.en:
Build a 5-second HyperFrames composition (1920×1080, 30fps) for a minimal product reveal. The brief is restraint: one product, one accent color, no clutter.

Visual identity: dark canvas #0b0b0f, warm rust accent #ffb76b, off-white text #f5f1ea, secondary slate #7da4ff used only on a single hairline rule. Display face: "Editorial New" or fallback "Times Now" at 140px for the brand wordmark; body in "Inter" 22px tracked +2%; tabular-nums on any digits.

Scene 1 (0–2.0s) — empty stage with a single hairline rule entering from the left at 0.2s, easing power3.out, 0.8s duration. At 0.6s a small caps kicker label "NEW · MAY 2026" fades in below the rule, x-offset 24px → 0, opacity 0 → 1, ease power2.out, 0.5s.

Scene 2 (2.0–4.2s) — the brand wordmark slides up from y=80 to y=0 with opacity 0→1 over 0.7s ease expo.out, staggered 80ms per character via gsap.from with each glyph wrapped in a span. Behind it a soft 540px radial glow #ffb76b at 12% opacity pulses once (scale 1 → 1.04 → 1, 1.6s ease sine.inOut). At 3.4s a one-line tagline (max 56 chars) rises in from y=24 over 0.5s.

Scene 3 (4.2–5.0s) — final hold. No exit animations on any element — the composition simply ends on the hero frame. The hairline rule extends another 80px on a 0.4s ease power2.out for a final breath.

Non-negotiables (HyperFrames contract): all timelines paused: true, registered to window.__timelines["main"]; deterministic only, no Math.random or Date.now; entrance-only animations (no opacity-to-0 exits); root <div> carries data-composition-id, data-width="1920", data-height="1080", data-duration="5".

Deliverable: index.html plus hyperframes.json + meta.json scaffold from `npx hyperframes init --example blank`. Render via daemon dispatch. Output a single descriptive .mp4 in the project root (e.g. `product-reveal-minimal.mp4`).
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 5-second HyperFrames composition (1920×1080, 30fps) for a minimal product reveal. The brief is restraint: one product, one accent color, no clutter.

Visual identity: dark canvas #0b0b0f, warm rust accent #ffb76b, off-white text #f5f1ea, secondary slate #7da4ff used only on a single hairline rule. Display face: "Editorial New" or fallback "Times Now" at 140px for the brand wordmark; body in "Inter" 22px tracked +2%; tabular-nums on any digits.

Scene 1 (0–2.0s) — empty stage with a single hairline rule entering from the left at 0.2s, easing power3.out, 0.8s duration. At 0.6s a small caps kicker label "NEW · MAY 2026" fades in below the rule, x-offset 24px → 0, opacity 0 → 1, ease power2.out, 0.5s.

Scene 2 (2.0–4.2s) — the brand wordmark slides up from y=80 to y=0 with opacity 0→1 over 0.7s ease expo.out, staggered 80ms per character via gsap.from with each glyph wrapped in a span. Behind it a soft 540px radial glow #ffb76b at 12% opacity pulses once (scale 1 → 1.04 → 1, 1.6s ease sine.inOut). At 3.4s a one-line tagline (max 56 chars) rises in from y=24 over 0.5s.

Scene 3 (4.2–5.0s) — final hold. No exit animations on any element — the composition simply ends on the hero frame. The hairline rule extends another 80px on a 0.4s ease power2.out for a final breath.

Non-negotiables (HyperFrames contract): all timelines paused: true, registered to window.__timelines["main"]; deterministic only, no Math.random or Date.now; entrance-only animations (no opacity-to-0 exits); root <div> carries data-composition-id, data-width="1920", data-height="1080", data-duration="5".

Deliverable: index.html plus hyperframes.json + meta.json scaffold from `npx hyperframes init --example blank`. Render via daemon dispatch. Output a single descriptive .mp4 in the project root (e.g. `product-reveal-minimal.mp4`).
